shellCommands.command: pwd && git status --short && ls && grep -R "renderCustomHeader\|changeMonth" -n src | head -80
sed -n '1450,1530p' src/index.tsx; grep -n "onMonthChange" src/index.tsx src/calendar.tsx | head -20; sed -n '240,290p' src/calendar.tsx; sed -n '700,740p' src/calendar.tsx
sed -n '120,230p' src/calendar.tsx; sed -n '1,35p' src/calendar.tsx; grep -R "monthSelectedIn" -n src/test | head -30
grep -n "onMonthChange\|handleMonth" src/index.tsx | head -30; sed -n '150,230p' src/index.tsx; sed -n '2790,2910p' src/test/datepicker_test.test.tsx
git diff && grep -n "setPreSelection =" src/index.tsx && sed -n '400,470p' src/index.tsx && cat package.json | head -30
git status --short && git diff -- src/calendar.tsx package.json | head -100
git checkout -- package.json && git diff --check && yarn -s tsc --noEmit --pretty false
git status --short && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/calendar.tsx
